error.signature: LOADING Redis is loading the dataset in memory
error.regex: (LOADING.*dataset|Redis is loading|LOADING.*memory|loading the dataset in memory)

verdict.summary: Redis is still loading the RDB/AOF dataset into memory after a restart. All commands are rejected until loading completes.

dead_ends.action: Kill and restart Redis again to speed up loading
dead_ends.why_fails: Restarting resets the loading process from zero; makes recovery take even longer

dead_ends.action: Delete the dump.rdb/appendonly.aof file to skip loading
dead_ends.why_fails: Deletes all persisted data permanently; Redis starts empty

workarounds.action: Wait for loading to complete; monitor progress with INFO
workarounds.how: redis-cli INFO persistence  # check loading_eta_seconds and loading_loaded_perc

workarounds.action: Configure application retry logic to handle transient LOADING state
workarounds.how: Retry with exponential backoff on LOADING errors; typical load time: 1s per GB on SSD

workarounds.action: Reduce dataset size or use faster storage for quicker startup
workarounds.how: Use SSD instead of HDD; enable lazyfree-lazy-expire to reduce dataset size
